results.name: foreign-missing-today
results.title: Do not drive into the inner city yet
results.text: The sticker question is not solved, and your plan points toward the low-emission zone. Park outside, ask the rental desk, or switch to public transport before entering.

results.name: outside
results.title: You may not need the sticker for this route
results.text: If your whole drive stays outside the S-Bahn Ring, the Berlin Umweltzone is probably not the main issue. Keep checking signs before you cross into the inner city.

results.name: electric-green
results.title: Drive in with the visible sticker route
results.text: An electric or plug-in car with a visible green sticker has a clear sticker path. If you rely on an EV exemption instead, check the official rule before entering.

results.name: electric-unchecked
results.title: Check the electric vehicle exemption before driving in
results.text: Berlin.de lists exemptions for electric vehicles and plug-in hybrids with an E plate, but foreign electric vehicles may need a blue E sticker if the exemption is not obvious.

results.name: delivery
results.title: Do not drive into the inner city yet
results.text: The sticker question is not solved, and your plan points toward the low-emission zone. Park outside, ask the rental desk, or switch to public transport before entering.

results.name: not-picked
results.title: Ask before you leave the rental desk
results.text: This is the easiest moment to fix the problem. Ask whether the car can enter Berlin Umweltzone and confirm the windscreen sticker before loading luggage.
